name: ALLSTATE CORP
summary: The Allstate Corporation, incorporated in Delaware in 1992, is one of the largest publicly held personal lines insurers in the United States. It offers auto, homeowners, and other personal lines insurance through exclusive agents, independent agents, and direct channels under the Allstate, National General, Direct Auto, and Answer Financial brands. Additional offerings include consumer product protection plans, roadside assistance, automotive protection products, identity protection, and mobility intelligence services using automotive telematics.

products.name: Auto Insurance
products.description: Private passenger auto insurance offered through exclusive, independent, and direct channels.

products.name: Homeowners Insurance
products.description: Homeowners insurance products offered across multiple distribution channels.

products.name: Other Personal Lines Insurance
products.description: Renters, condo, umbrella, boat, motorcycle, and other personal lines insurance products.

products.name: Commercial Lines Insurance
products.description: Select commercial property and casualty insurance coverages.

products.name: Consumer Product Protection Plans
products.description: Protection plans for consumer products distributed through retailers and mobile operators in North America, Europe, and Asia.

products.name: Roadside Assistance
products.description: Roadside assistance services modernized through technology and digital capabilities.

products.name: Dealer Services
products.description: Allstate-branded protection and insurance products distributed through auto dealerships and direct to consumer.

products.name: Identity Protection
products.description: Full-service identity protection and restoration products offered through partnerships and direct channels.

products.name: Arity Telematics
products.description: Mobility intelligence and telematics analytics solutions serving insurers, retailers, mapping companies, and public sector clients.

products.name: Answer Financial
products.description: Comparison quotes and sales platform for Allstate, National General, and non-proprietary insurance products.

products.name: Allstate Mobile App
products.description: Mobile application providing connected customer experiences and telematics-based pricing features.

partnerships.description: Distribution of National General and Allstate products through independent agent locations across the U.S.
Distribution of consumer product protection plans through new and existing retailers and mobile operators in North America, Europe, and Asia.
